channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: 鞘師里保が小西桜子とダブル主演、ガールズラブマンガ「付き合ってあげてもいいかな」ドラマ化（コメントあり） https:…

item.title: Thunderstorms with high winds could make it more difficult t…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Thunderstorms with high winds could make it more difficult to contain a massive wildfire that has scorched parts of southern Colorado. n.pr/4eUA6cp
item.content:encoded: Thunderstorms with high winds could make it more difficult to contain a massive wildfire that has scorched parts of southern Colorado. n.pr/4eUA6cp

item.title: Jazz Left Behind By Streaming. The stream-scape is miles wid…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Jazz Left Behind By Streaming. The stream-scape is miles wide and maybe—maybe—a tiny fraction of an inch deep. You can find jazz on the streamers, but records and artists at the margins of what is already a niche genre tend to be neglected.
item.content:encoded: Jazz Left Behind By Streaming. The stream-scape is miles wide and maybe—maybe—a tiny fraction of an inch deep. You can find jazz on the streamers, but records and artists at the margins of what is already a niche genre tend to be neglected.

item.title: FIFA's Disciplinary Committee said it would suspend Balogun'…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: FIFA's Disciplinary Committee said it would suspend Balogun's one-game red card ban for a probationary period of one year. The Royal Belgian Football Federation said it was "astonished."
item.content:encoded: FIFA's Disciplinary Committee said it would suspend Balogun's one-game red card ban for a probationary period of one year. The Royal Belgian Football Federation said it was "astonished."

item.title: As much of the Eastern U.S. experiences potentially record-b…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: As much of the Eastern U.S. experiences potentially record-breaking daytime temperatures, the nights are also staying unusually warm, leaving the human body no time to recover.
item.content:encoded: As much of the Eastern U.S. experiences potentially record-breaking daytime temperatures, the nights are also staying unusually warm, leaving the human body no time to recover.

item.title: Memphis police say National Guard troops fired their weapons…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Memphis police say National Guard troops fired their weapons in the early morning hours of July 5th, killing a man who was armed with a handgun. State investigators will handle the case.
item.content:encoded: Memphis police say National Guard troops fired their weapons in the early morning hours of July 5th, killing a man who was armed with a handgun. State investigators will handle the case.

item.title: Every month, Ted Davis scours the cerebral fringes of Bandca…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Every month, Ted Davis scours the cerebral fringes of Bandcamp. This column adopts a fluid approach—anything deemed worthy of the genre tag is considered eligible. The Best Ambient Music on Bandcamp, June 2026.
item.content:encoded: Every month, Ted Davis scours the cerebral fringes of Bandcamp. This column adopts a fluid approach—anything deemed worthy of the genre tag is considered eligible. The Best Ambient Music on Bandcamp, June 2026.

item.title: U.S. soccer star Folarin Balogun has had his World Cup ban s…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: U.S. soccer star Folarin Balogun has had his World Cup ban suspended by FIFA, making him free to play in the United States' round of 16 game against Belgium on Monday. n.pr/4bp0hqE
item.content:encoded: U.S. soccer star Folarin Balogun has had his World Cup ban suspended by FIFA, making him free to play in the United States' round of 16 game against Belgium on Monday. n.pr/4bp0hqE

item.title: Julian Casablancas expanded on his recent comments about Isr…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
Julian Casablancas expanded on his recent comments about Israel in a speech at the Oxford Union.

He argued for more precise political language, saying “Zionism” has become too broad to be useful, and proposed more specific categories “to help avoid future discord.”

stereogum.com/2504199/juli...
item.content:encoded:
Julian Casablancas expanded on his recent comments about Israel in a speech at the Oxford Union.

He argued for more precise political language, saying “Zionism” has become too broad to be useful, and proposed more specific categories “to help avoid future discord.”

stereogum.com/2504199/juli...

item.title: Recently, on The Helpline, we helped a fan looking for a few…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description:
Recently, on The Helpline, we helped a fan looking for a few laughs and a newly minted Margo Price fan ready to go down the rabbit hole.

Check it out on Substack.
item.content:encoded:
Recently, on The Helpline, we helped a fan looking for a few laughs and a newly minted Margo Price fan ready to go down the rabbit hole.

Check it out on Substack.

item.title: People in the Northern Mariana Islands – remote U.S. territo…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: People in the Northern Mariana Islands – remote U.S. territories in the Pacific Ocean – are preparing for Super Typhoon Bavi, which experts say could bring winds of over 180 miles per hour. n.pr/4fim6L0
item.content:encoded: People in the Northern Mariana Islands – remote U.S. territories in the Pacific Ocean – are preparing for Super Typhoon Bavi, which experts say could bring winds of over 180 miles per hour. n.pr/4fim6L0

item.title: Women make up a miniscule 3% of construction workers in Keny…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Women make up a miniscule 3% of construction workers in Kenya. But a nonprofit group is offering them a way to get into the game ... and to get ahead. n.pr/4y6n1pi
item.content:encoded: Women make up a miniscule 3% of construction workers in Kenya. But a nonprofit group is offering them a way to get into the game ... and to get ahead. n.pr/4y6n1pi

item.title: In June’s edition of Best Punk releases on Bandcamp, Sims Ha…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: In June’s edition of Best Punk releases on Bandcamp, Sims Hardin highlights the futuristic horror of L.O.T.I.O.N, the artful clang of Artificial Go, the blinding destruction of Mirage, and many other new and exciting rippers!
item.content:encoded: In June’s edition of Best Punk releases on Bandcamp, Sims Hardin highlights the futuristic horror of L.O.T.I.O.N, the artful clang of Artificial Go, the blinding destruction of Mirage, and many other new and exciting rippers!

item.title: One year ago, on July 5, 2025, the original lineup of Black …
item.author: Discogs (@discogsofficial.bsky.social)
item.description: One year ago, on July 5, 2025, the original lineup of Black Sabbath reunited for the first time in 20 years for an epic farewell to their fans with "Back to the Beginning," a massive, all-day benefit concert.
item.content:encoded: One year ago, on July 5, 2025, the original lineup of Black Sabbath reunited for the first time in 20 years for an epic farewell to their fans with "Back to the Beginning," a massive, all-day benefit concert.

item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: Fiona Apple did the title sequence for ‘Lucky’
item.content:encoded: Fiona Apple did the title sequence for ‘Lucky’

item.title: Paul McCartney played "I Want To Hold Your Hand" at Taylor S…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
Paul McCartney played "I Want To Hold Your Hand" at Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding.

It was the first time a Beatle performed the song since 1964.
item.content:encoded:
Paul McCartney played "I Want To Hold Your Hand" at Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding.

It was the first time a Beatle performed the song since 1964.

item.title: Spring's best albums are here. These are the records our edi…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description:
Spring's best albums are here. These are the records our editors couldn't stop returning to over the last three months.

See the full list, then tell us what's on your Best of Spring.
item.content:encoded:
Spring's best albums are here. These are the records our editors couldn't stop returning to over the last three months.

See the full list, then tell us what's on your Best of Spring.

item.title: The husband of former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi was involve…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The husband of former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi was involved in a hit-and-run in California that left a parked car with "major" damage, authorities said Saturday.
item.content:encoded: The husband of former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi was involved in a hit-and-run in California that left a parked car with "major" damage, authorities said Saturday.

item.title: Update: President Trump lauded America's storied history on…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description:
Update:

President Trump lauded America's storied history on Saturday night in a speech marking the 250th anniversary of its independence, while also praising his war in Iran, railing against "communists," and vowing to restrict mail-in ballots.
item.content:encoded:
Update:

President Trump lauded America's storied history on Saturday night in a speech marking the 250th anniversary of its independence, while also praising his war in Iran, railing against "communists," and vowing to restrict mail-in ballots.

item.title: A pastor of a prominent underground church who was detained …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: A pastor of a prominent underground church who was detained in China in October has been released, less than two months after U.S. President Donald Trump brought up his case when meeting Chinese leader Xi Jinping.
item.content:encoded: A pastor of a prominent underground church who was detained in China in October has been released, less than two months after U.S. President Donald Trump brought up his case when meeting Chinese leader Xi Jinping.

item.title: Documents reviewing the research on peptides note lack of go…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Documents reviewing the research on peptides note lack of good evidence of efficacy or safety. Yet an FDA panel will consider easing access to them later this month.
item.content:encoded: Documents reviewing the research on peptides note lack of good evidence of efficacy or safety. Yet an FDA panel will consider easing access to them later this month.

item.title: Spread by parasitic worms that can infect via a splash of wa…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Spread by parasitic worms that can infect via a splash of water, schistosomiasis causes debilitating symptoms. It hits kids hard. A board game teaches how to prevent it.
item.content:encoded: Spread by parasitic worms that can infect via a splash of water, schistosomiasis causes debilitating symptoms. It hits kids hard. A board game teaches how to prevent it.

item.title: ◤📝ライブレポ / 📸独占カット含む18枚◢ #原因は自分にある。アリーナツアー「仮ノ現」 観測者と創り上げ…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
◤📝ライブレポ / 📸独占カット含む18枚◢

#原因は自分にある。アリーナツアー「仮ノ現」
観測者と創り上げた熱狂空間のすべて

「あなたと僕たちで、僕たちらしく」──
💜吉澤＆💙長野（🆕!）の誕生日祝いも🎂🎉
https://natalie.mu/music/news/679355?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social
@genjibu_sdr

item.title: The closure of the Strait of Hormuz disrupted shipments of f…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The closure of the Strait of Hormuz disrupted shipments of fertilizer and natural gas, a key component in fertilizer manufacturing. It's unlikely to cause major price hikes for U.S. grocery shoppers.
item.content:encoded: The closure of the Strait of Hormuz disrupted shipments of fertilizer and natural gas, a key component in fertilizer manufacturing. It's unlikely to cause major price hikes for U.S. grocery shoppers.

item.title: Around the time the United States was founded, Americans' di…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Around the time the United States was founded, Americans' diets included Parmesan ice cream and terrapin. But what you ate depended on your social status.
item.content:encoded: Around the time the United States was founded, Americans' diets included Parmesan ice cream and terrapin. But what you ate depended on your social status.

item.title: Man, it's a hot one! Don't go out in this summer's heat wave…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Man, it's a hot one! Don't go out in this summer's heat wave before you arm yourself with these tips and a really big water bottle.
item.content:encoded: Man, it's a hot one! Don't go out in this summer's heat wave before you arm yourself with these tips and a really big water bottle.

item.title: The Airbnb-style company Swimply said there have been about …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The Airbnb-style company Swimply said there have been about 275,000 private pool reservations so far this year.
item.content:encoded: The Airbnb-style company Swimply said there have been about 275,000 private pool reservations so far this year.

item.title: A Trump executive order pushes involuntary treatment for hom…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: A Trump executive order pushes involuntary treatment for homeless people; the VA denies that would include homeless vets.
item.content:encoded: A Trump executive order pushes involuntary treatment for homeless people; the VA denies that would include homeless vets.

item.title: 原因は自分にある。5thシングル発売決定 「鉄鍋のジャン！」主題歌のMV近日公開 https://natalie.m…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
原因は自分にある。5thシングル発売決定
「鉄鍋のジャン！」主題歌のMV近日公開

item.title: The husband of former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi was involve…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The husband of former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi was involved in a hit-and-run in California that left a parked car with "major" damage, authorities said Saturday. n.pr/4eTLGVe
item.content:encoded: The husband of former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi was involved in a hit-and-run in California that left a parked car with "major" damage, authorities said Saturday. n.pr/4eTLGVe

item.title: Drugmakers are working on a potential new shot to prevent th…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Drugmakers are working on a potential new shot to prevent the tick-borne illness. How might it fare in the era of vaccine skepticism?
